svg.text: Multi-modal Adaptive Visual Embedding Retrieval with Integrated Consistency

g.text: REFERENCE GENERATION SUBSYSTEM (One-Time Setup Per Dataset)
REACT Templates: "a photo of a {}" | "a satellite photo of {}" (EuroSAT)
"a zoomed in photo of a {} traffic sign" (GTSRB) | "a photo of {}, a type of food" (Food101)
Cached embeddings enable fast retrieval: No re-computation needed
Reference embeddings reused across multiple retrieval runs (80-95% speedup)
